reviews.comment:
Primera y última vez! Le pedí al playero la contraseña del wifi para poder pagar con la aplicación de YPF y me dijo que si tenía 4G no la necesitaba. Se la volví a pedir y le dijo al compañero “a ver cuando cargas el abono”. Con qué necesidad denigran a un cliente de esa manera? Mala selección de personal, un MALEDUCADO. Nunca más.

(Translated by Google)
First and last time! I asked the gas station attendant for the Wi-Fi password so I could pay with the YPF app, and he told me that if I had 4G, I didn't need it. I asked again, and he told his colleague, "Let's see when you top up your plan." Why treat a customer like that? Poor staffing, and he was rude. Never again.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQyLXBLUWxRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Domingo por la mañana. Playero exigiendo barbijo a los clientes. Estando al aire libre. Sino tienen, exigiendoles q se queden dentro del auto para cargarles combustible. Nunca mas YPF. Nunca mas ACA.

(Translated by Google)
Sunday morning. Beachcomber demanding masks from customers. Standing outdoors. If they don't have one, he demands they stay inside their cars while he fills up their cars. Never again at YPF. Never again at ACA.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQyckt6d2lBRRAB
